Off Calendar Jun-02-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ana C.Post, respondent/plaintiff, with witnesses Leslie Kiner and Roscoe Jackson.
Christine Tour-Sarkissian, Esq., for appellant/defendant Kamel Totah, who is also present.

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. The parties are sworn. The parties report they settled the case and recite a written stipulation in open court. The court approves the settlement, vacates the small claim judgment and dismisses this action.
